description: Express router module defining REST API endpoints for orchestration workflows in a project related to build workflows, uploads, normalization, and AI persona generation. It sets up routes for starting orchestrations, running full workflows, retrieving orchestration status, linking uploads, extracting and normalizing text, generating persona drafts, and finalizing personas.

methods.name: POST /start
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session, creating a build/workflow context.

methods.name: POST /run-all
methods.description: Runs the entire build workflow end-to-end in a single call, from orchestration start to finalization.

methods.name: GET /builds/:id
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record/status for a given build id.

methods.name: POST /builds/:id/link-upload
methods.description: Links an upload or document to an existing build id.

methods.name: POST /builds/:id/extract-normalize
methods.description: Derives combined normalized text for the build from linked documents.

methods.name: POST /builds/:id/generate-draft
methods.description: Generates a persona draft from normalized text, serving as a placeholder for AI generation.

methods.name: POST /builds/:id/finalize
methods.description: Finalizes the persona, saving the blob and optionally creating a new version.
